# Topic Name

<!-- 1–2 sentences on why this vocabulary matters or where/when it is used. -->
Knowing [topic] vocabulary is essential for [context/situation]. This lesson covers [category 1], [category 2], and [category 3].

## [Category 1]

<!-- Keep tables to ≤10 rows. If more words are needed, split into subsections.
     Columns: Hiragana | Kanji | Romaji | English | Type
     - Nouns and adjectives get an emoji in the English column.
     - Verbs get NO emoji in the English column.
     - Add a Usage/Notes column when register differences apply (e.g. formal/humble/honorific).
     - Never merge grammatically different types (nouns, adjectives, verbs) in one table. -->

| Hiragana | Kanji | Romaji | English | Type |
|----------|-------|--------|---------|------|
| [word] | [kanji] | [romaji] | 🔤 [meaning] | noun |
| [word] | [kanji] | [romaji] | 🔤 [meaning] | noun |
| [word] | [kanji] | [romaji] | [meaning] | verb |

:::warning [Easily Confused Word]
**[word A]** means [meaning A], while **[word B]** means [meaning B]. Don't mix them up!
:::

**Examples:**

- [Japanese sentence] — [English translation].
  - *[romaji]*
- [Japanese sentence] — [English translation].
  - *[romaji]*

| Hiragana | Kanji | Romaji | English | Usage | Type |

| [word] | [kanji] | [romaji] | 🔤 [meaning] | [Your own / Someone else's] | noun |

cultural context sections are consistently added in later revisions; include from the start.]

**Examples:**

  - *[romaji]*
- [Japanese sentence] — [English translation].

| Hiragana | Kanji | Romaji | English | Type |

| [word] | [kanji] | [romaji] | 🔤 [meaning] | adjective |
| [word] | [kanji] | [romaji] | [meaning] | verb |

**Examples:**

- [Japanese sentence] — [English translation].

## Useful Expressions

<!-- Optional but recommended for topic-specific vocabulary.
     Use Q&A format for dialogues, or plain bullets for set phrases. -->

### At the [Place] / Asking about [Topic]

- Q: [Japanese question] — [English].
  - *[romaji]*
- A: [Japanese answer] — [English].
  - *[romaji]*

- Q: [Japanese question] — [English].
  - *[romaji]*
- A: [Japanese answer] — [English].
  - *[romaji]*

### [Second Dialogue Scenario]

- [Japanese phrase] — [English].
  - *[romaji]*
- [Japanese phrase] — [English].
  - *[romaji]*

:::tip Common Phrases
<!-- Idioms and set expressions that don't fit neatly into the tables above. -->
- [phrase] ([kanji]) — [meaning]
  - [when/how to use it]
- [phrase] ([kanji]) — [meaning]
  - *[romaji]*
:::
